---
listing:
  contents: "20notes/*.qmd"
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  image-placeholder: img/image-placeholder.png
  fields: [image, date]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true

format:
  html:
    theme:
      - iframe_match.scss
    css: _vars.css
    include-in-header: preprocessing.html
---
